entries.source_text: Zero stale current-state assertions across the walked surface
acceptance_criteria: every deterministic-scan hit adjudicated: fixed (current-state) or dispositioned (historical)
post-sweep re-scan returns zero unadjudicated current-state hits
historical narrative byte-preserved (CHANGELOG body + frozen zones diff-clean except sanctioned cross-ref fixes)

entries.source_text: Zero dead pointers in walked docs
acceptance_criteria: per-group dead-pointer extraction+verification run with output captured
every cited repo path in walked docs resolves post-sweep (or the citation was removed with surrounding text corrected)

entries.source_text: Every walked doc dispositioned; ledger refreshed
acceptance_criteria: merged ledger covers all walked docs (count reconciles against git ls-files minus frozen zones)
an independent auditor (not a sweep team) re-scans the widened surface + spot-verifies fixes + verifies history preservation; verdict overall: pass gates the commit
rubric-conforming CHANGELOG entry (no historical entry edited)

testing_authorizations.playwright: N/A - docs-only run, no frontend surface; authorization recorded per Phase 1 rule.
testing_authorizations.dev_api_integration: N/A - docs-only run, no API surface.
